title: A Woman of Distinction
writer: Charles Hoffman, Frank Tashlin, Ian McLellan Hunter
actors: Rosalind Russell, Ray Milland, Edmund Gwenn
plot: Ice-cold college dean Susan Middlecott feels there's no room in her life for romance. Enter Prof. Alec Stevenson, British lecturer on astronomy, touring North America and in possession of a keepsake of Susan's he wants to return. ...
